label: Email with multiple distinct action items

data.subject: Action items from Monday standup
data.textBody:
Hi team,

Here are the action items from today's standup:

1. Update the API documentation for the new endpoints (due: Wednesday)
2. Fix the flaky integration test in the CI pipeline (due: Tuesday)
3. Schedule a design review for the dashboard redesign (due: Thursday)
4. Send the quarterly report to stakeholders (due: Friday April 10th)
5. Review and merge the pending PRs from last week

Please update the Jira board as you complete each item.

Thanks,
James
